     The Numbers Business Report

She Said (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,825,995Details
International Box Office $8,130,389
Worldwide Box Office $13,956,384
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $65,818
Total $65,818
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The journey of reporters and editors who engaged in the unrelenting pursuit of the truth, and a story about the courage of survivors and witnesses who chose to come forward to stop a serial predator in his tracks. Together, their commitment and fortitude sparked a national conversation, helped propel the #MeToo movement, and fueled a reckoning of the system that had enabled him.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,217,010 (38.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.63 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,022 opening theaters/2,023 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $6,617,181

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 18th, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Ukraine)
November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Trinidad)
November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
November 17th, 2022 (Wide) (Kazakhstan)
Video Release: January 10th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language and descriptions of sexual assault.
(Rating bulletin 2746 (cert #54018), 8/24/2022)
Running Time: 129 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: F-Rated, F-Rated, Triple
Plot point: Investigative Journalist, News, Sex Crimes, Sexism
Social setting: Movie Business, Social Justice
Subgenre: Docudrama
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Annapurna Pictures, Plan B Entertainment, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis
